info.name: Obotoronika API
info.description:
## ওবোটোরোনিকা API

### Setup Instructions
1. Import this collection into Postman
2. Set `base_url` to your local/dev/production URL
3. Run **🔐 Auth → Sign In** to get auth token
4. Token is auto-stored in `auth_token` variable

### Demo Credentials
- **Customer:** customer@demo.com / password123
- **Admin:** admin@demo.com / password123

### Variables (Auto-configured)
| Variable | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `base_url` | API base URL (default: `http://localhost:3000`) |
| `auth_token` | Auto-populated after login |
| `user_email` | Demo user email |
| `user_password` | Demo user password |
| `product_id` | Selected product UUID |
| `product_slug` | Product slug for detail page |
| `order_id` | Selected order ID |
| `cart_id` | Cart item ID |
| `address_id` | Address ID |
| `category_id` | Dashboard category ID |
| `user_id` | User UUID for admin ops |
| `merchant_id` | Merchant ID |
